title: Jellyflow Geometry Spatial v1
problem: Jellyflow lacks a single headless geometry/spatial substrate; fit-view, bounds helpers, lookup-derived layout, and geometry-adjacent config are scattered or only partially backed by shared behavior.

evidence.summary: Opened the geometry/spatial workstream from the fearless-refactor top recommendation. Workspace baseline nextest passed with 191 tests before code changes.

Added a crate-private runtime::geometry module for shared canvas bounds, node-origin projection, rect relation math, and viewport fit framing. Routed fit-view and runtime bounds helpers through it without changing public behavior; targeted gates passed.

Added sorted parent/child lookup helpers derived from node_lookup and strengthened deterministic node-inside linear fallback coverage for hidden nodes, missing sizes, and sorted output. Deferred a real spatial-index backend as a follow-on.

Made runtime::geometry public for renderer-neutral endpoint geometry, added handle side anchors and edge source/target endpoint output, and exposed connection_for_edge on NodeGraphLookups. Targeted endpoint gates passed.
Added renderer-neutral straight, bezier, and smoothstep-like edge path commands, numeric path-distance hit testing, and config-derived hit-test options. Targeted edge_path and hit_test gates passed.
Updated root and runtime READMEs, added a geometry_edge runtime example, and passed runtime package gates.

Closed the workstream after full workspace nextest, clippy, dependency-boundary, external-consumer, JSON, and diff-hygiene gates passed. Split real spatial indexing and interaction kernels as follow-ons.

continue_policy.notes: This lane is closed. Open separate follow-ons for a real spatial-index backend, interaction kernels, schema migration, or crate publishing.
